title: Add a single line "lint_ignore" verilator comment
body:
Currently, to selectively disable linting, it's necessary to add a lint_off statement before, and a lint_on statement after. While this is perfectly reasonable for big chunks of code, it is breaking code readability for single lines. 

Would it be possible to add a single line "lint_ignore" comment, applied to the line it is found at only?

For example:

```verilog
wire [7:0] my_acceptable_signal; // verilator lint_ignore WIDTH
```

seems much more readable than:

```verilog
/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */
wire [7:0] my acceptable_signal;
/* verilator lint_on WIDTH */
```

Especially when more than one signals are declared.
